name: vri-msme-credit-scoring
description: AI-powered MSME credit scoring using GST data, XGBoost, and Claude

scripts.dev: python3 -m pip install -r demo/backend/requirements.txt && bash start-dev.sh
scripts.dev:backend: python3 -m pip install -r demo/backend/requirements.txt && cd demo/backend && python3 -m uvicorn src.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.start: python3 -m pip install -r demo/backend/requirements.txt && cd demo/backend && python3 -m uvicorn src.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000

author: VRI Team
